svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="6YliBiO5g5nkEkx_KyBz"> <mxGraphModel dx="2357" dy="1460" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="0" fold="1" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="light-dark(#FFFFFF,#FFFFFF)" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "erDiagram
 %% Relationships
 Semester ||--o{ Class : \"has\"
 Course ||--o{ Class : \"has\"
 
 Student ||--o{ Enrollment : \"enrolls in\"
 Class ||--o{ Enrollment : \"receives\"
 
 Class ||--o{ ClassSession : \"schedules\"
 Teacher ||--o{ ClassSession : \"teaches\"
 
 ClassSession ||--o{ Attendance : \"records\"
 Student ||--o{ Attendance : \"is marked in\"

 %% Tables
 Semester {
 INT Id PK
 VARCHAR SemesterCode \"UNIQUE\"
 VARCHAR SemesterName
 }

 Course {
 INT Id PK
 VARCHAR CourseCode \"UNIQUE\"
 VARCHAR CourseName
 INT Credits
 }

 Student {
 INT Id PK
 VARCHAR StudentCode \"UNIQUE\"
 VARCHAR FullName
 VARCHAR Email
 }

 Teacher {
 INT Id PK
 VARCHAR TeacherCode \"UNIQUE\"
 VARCHAR FullName
 VARCHAR Email
 }

 Class {
 INT Id PK
 VARCHAR ClassCode
 INT CourseId FK
 INT SemesterId FK
 }

 Enrollment {
 INT StudentId PK, FK
 INT ClassId PK, FK
 }

 ClassSession {
 INT Id PK
 INT ClassId FK
 INT TeacherId FK
 DATE SessionDate
 VARCHAR Room
 VARCHAR TimeSlot
 }

 Attendance {
 INT SessionId PK, FK
 INT StudentId PK, FK
 ENUM Status \"Present, Absent, ExcusedAbsent\"
 TEXT Notes
 DATETIME AttendanceTime
 }",
 "config": null
}" id="-IvieEG_zdyKU8fTYMiI-44"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;imageAspect=1;image=data:image/svg+xml,;labelBackgroundColor=none;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1363" width="1152" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
